version_description: The intro and interlude have both been cut because they are mostly percussive so there are no guitar chords for these parts.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Verse 1]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]
With music by our side to break the color lines[/tab]

Let's work together to improve our way of life

Join voices in protest to social injustice

A generation full of courage, come forth with me

[Chorus]
N.C.
People of the world today

Are we looking for a better way of life?

Sing!
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
We are a part of the rhythm nation[/tab]
N.C.
People of the world unite

Strength in numbers, we can get it right, one time

Sing it up!
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                                  [ch]Em[/ch]
We are a part of the rhythm nation[/tab]

[Verse 2]

This is the test, no struggle, no progress (Lend)

Lend a hand to help your brother do his best

Things are getting worse, we have to make them better
N.C.
It's time to give a damn, let's work together

Come on now

[Chorus]

People of the world today

Are we looking for a better way of life?

Sing!
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
We are a part of the rhythm nation[/tab]

Sing it up!
